arts.ttl: Arsenal: Bukayo Saka pulled away from Real Madrid star Dani Carvajal during heated half-time clash
arts.sum: The Real Madrid defender, who is injured, followed the Arsenal man down the tunnel

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka in furious tunnel bust-up with Real Madrid star after Arsenal drama
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka missed a penalty in the first half of his side's Champions League quarter-final secondleg tie at Real Madrid, and home icon Dani Carvajal had a few words for him

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive new VAR verdict after Real Madrid penalty chaos
arts.sum: Arsenal have been told that they were right to receive a penalty in a dramatic first half against Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals. "Do you know what I am going to say to you?

arts.ttl: Arsenal get red card verdict for 'reckless' David Alaba tackle on Bukayo Saka vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender David Alaba's challenge on Arsenal star Bukayo Saka has been labelled 'reckless' after the left-back escaped an early red card in Wednesday night's Champions League quarter-final second-leg. VAR, which didn't get involved with Alaba's challenge on Saka, was called upon not long later when Arsenal were awarded a penalty.

arts.ttl: UEFA release statement after Kylian Mbappe VAR penalty U-turn as Arsenal escape suspension blow
arts.sum: The decision to cancel the penalty meant Rice avoided a potential suspension after being booked for his challenge on Mbappe. UEFA have confirmed that Real Madrid's penalty on Kylian Mbappe was overturned after it was decided that Declan Rice did not foul the attacker.

arts.ttl: What Declan Rice told Kylian Mbappe after Real Madrid vs Arsenal penalty and VAR controversy
arts.sum: Declan Rice was quick to plead his innocence after match referee Francois Letexier had awarded Real Madrid a penalty against Arsenal. Turning towards Mbappe and the referee, Rice continued to fight his corner as a five-minute review followed.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Real Madrid stars separated after heated exchange at half-time
arts.sum: Footage of a heated exchange between members of the first-team squads at Real Madrid and Arsenal has come to the fore online. This of course comes amid the ongoing action…

arts.ttl: UEFA issue statement on Real Madrid penalty decision after VAR drama in Arsenal Champions League clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid were awarded a penalty in the second half of their Champions League clash with Arsenal after Kylian Mbappe was brought down by Declan Rice

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist 'can't believe' what he saw during Real Madrid vs Arsenal as pundit left gobsmacked
arts.sum: The Rangers legend watched on in disbelief from the commentary box at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Arsenal leave Chelsea stunned after Moises Caicedo transfer demand
arts.sum: Arsenal have entered the race for Chelsea target Joel Ordonez, according to a report. According to Just Arsenal, the Gunners have now entered the race to sign Ordonez as they look to add a young defender to their ranks.
